title: Obliterator

{{Quote|Signal to the Obliterator and Ironhand, ''[…]'' Pull back and withdraw. Repeat: pull back and withdraw. ''[…]'' A short jump in any direction. ''[…]'' And after that, set course directly for Bastion. Grand Admiral Thrawn needs to hear about this.|Captain Nalgol|<ref name="VF" />}}
The '''''Obliterator''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] serving in the [[Navy/Legends|starfleet]] of the [[Imperial Remnant]] at least [[19 ABY/Legends|fifteen years after]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Trazzen]], this was one of four [[Braxant Sector Fleet]] Star Destroyers—the others were the [[Relentless (Dorja)|''Relentless'']], the ''[[Tyrannic]]'' and the [[Ironhand (Imperial-class)|''Ironhand'']]—that pledged its allegiance to a recuperated [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], who was in fact a con-artist named [[Flim (Human)|Flim]]. Its mission was to exploit the [[Caamas Document Crisis]] in order to begin a civil war within the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. In that capacity, ''Obliterator'' was outfitted with a [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking shield]]. The plan was to spark the conflict over the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] homeworld of [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]], but the plan was foiled and the Star Destroyers were ordered to retreat.
